title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 251.110 - Biennial report to be submitted
text:
251.110.  Biennial report to be submitted. — The department shall prepare and submit a biennial report to the governor and to the legislature which shall include such recommendations as the department may deem desirable to improve the quality, organization, and functioning of local government in Missouri.
(L. 1967 p. 357 § 11)
